sample_pool_entries_first5.nl: The Emmet Building is a five-story building in Portland, Oregon.

sample_pool_entries_first5.broken_evidence: parse_fol returns None (hyphenated predicates, XOR operator, or unbalanced parens)

sample_pool_entries_first5.nl: Lily is in James' family; she watches TV series in cinemas.
